message.content: Adversaries may exploit the Permission Groups Discovery: Cloud Groups technique to identify cloud groups and their permission settings. This information helps them understand user roles and group associations within an environment, potentially targeting high-privilege accounts. Common methods include using tools like Get-MsolRole for Exchange and Office 365, Azure CLI (az ad user get-member-groups), Google Cloud Identity Provider API, AWS GetBucketAcl API, AADInternals, and ROADTools to enumerate Azure AD groups. The impact of this technique can be significant, as it enables adversaries to escalate privileges, move laterally, or access sensitive data. Mitigation strategies include implementing strict access controls, regularly auditing group memberships and permissions, using multi-factor authentication, and monitoring for unusual access patterns to detect and respond to unauthorized enumeration activities.
